sys_ux_data_broker_transform.description: Data resource approve or reject the snapshot
sys_ux_data_broker_transform.name: PB Public Update Snapshot
sys_ux_data_broker_transform.props: [ { "name": "sysId", "label": "SysId of the Snapshot record", "fieldType": "string", "valueType": "object", "readOnly": false, "mandatory": true, "description": "" }, { "name": "email", "label": "Email address to send to", "fieldType": "string", "valueType": "object", "readOnly": false, "mandatory": false, "description": "" }, { "name": "approved", "label": "Approved", "fieldType": "boolean", "valueType": "boolean", "readOnly": false, "mandatory": false, "description": "Whether or not the user approves the snapshot. If not it will be deleted." } ]
